HAIL UP TO QUARTER SIZE COVERED THE GROUND
HAIL COVERED THE GROUND. SOME HAILSTONES WERE AS BIG AS BASEBALLS.
HAIL WAS FALLING AT THE OLD SALINE COUNTY AIRPORT JUST OFF INTERSTATE 30.

THERE WAS A LOT OF PEA SIZE HAIL WITH SOME HAILSTONES AS LARGE AS QUARTERS.
APPROXIMATELY 20 HOUSES WERE DAMAGED NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF ARKANSAS HIGHWAYS 5 AND 298. TREES AND POWER LINES WERE BLOWN DOWN. NO INJURIES WERE REPORTED.

THIS IS THE THIRD HAILSTORM TO AFFECT WALTON HEIGHTS THIS EVENING.

*** 1 INJ *** SO FAR...NINE HOUSES HAVE BEEN REPORTED TO HAVE BEEN DAMAGED NEAR THE INTERSECTION OF HIGHWAYS 36 AND 305. ONE PERSON SUFFERED A LEG INJURY AND WAS TRANSPORTED TO THE HOSPITAL. TREES AND POWER LINES WERE BLOWN DOWN. ADDITIONAL DAMAGE HAS BEEN REPORTED ON BLOODWORTH ROAD NORTH OF CENTER HILL. THE TIME OF THE TORNADO WAS ESTIMATED.
HAIL RANGED FROM NICKEL TO QUARTER SIZE.

*** 1 FATAL, 3 INJ *** A HOUSE AND MOBILE HOME ON SOUTH SAWMILL ROAD WERE DESTROYED. MAJOR APPLIANCES FROM THE HOUSE WERE BLOWN MORE THAN 750 FEET. A 79 YEAR OLD MAN WAS KILLED...AND HIS WIFE AND GRANDSON WERE INJURED. A VEHICLE WAS BLOWN OFF HIGHWAY 107...INJURING THE OCCUPANT. TREES AND POWER LINES WERE BLOWN DOWN...AND OUTBUILDINGS WERE DESTROYED. DEBRIS FROM THE STORM WERE FOUND NEAR GREERS FERRY LAKE...ABOUT 2 MILES AWAY.
*** 3 INJ *** HOUSES WERE BADLY DAMAGED...AND TREES AND POWER LINES WERE BLOWN DOWN. THERE WERE THREE MAJOR INJURIES REPORTED. THE TIME OF THE EVENT WAS ESTIMATED FROM RADAR.
HAIL RANGED FROM DIME TO QUARTER SIZE.
THREE CHICKEN HOUSES WERE DESTROYED...AND SEVERAL DAMAGED.

*** 4 FATAL *** THIS INFORMATION IS PRELIMINARY. EMERGENCY MANAGEMENT REPORTS AT LEAST 4 FLASH FLOOD FATALITIES AT THE ALBERT PIKE CAMPGROUND IN THE SOUTHWEST CORNER OF MONTGOMERY COUNTY. A SEARCH IS UNDERWAY AT THIS TIME FOR ADDITIONAL CAMPERS...BUT IT IS UNKNOWN AT THIS TIME HOW MANY OTHER PEOPLE MIGHT BE MISSING.
LAW ENFORCEMENT WAS TRYING TO MOVE CAMPERS TO SAFER LOCATIONS AROUND THE ALBERT PIKE RECREATION AREA...WITH HIGH WATER RESCUES EXPECTED.
